LPWE-124 ATP / Delivery Date Logic resolved: Harry Donihue 23:46 UTC replied to Leslie/Miguel answering all open questions — no international/territory detection without IP/zip, threshold-config window drives the "if ordered in X hr Y mins" / "by 1pm Pacific" verbiage, intentional no-estimate cases are Store Pickup/In-Store + Sold Out + Multiple Shipping Address, Build Full System products no longer exist, and Combo SKUs should display worst-case ATP from Component SKUs via a single multi-SKU API call. This matches with figma mockup."), resolving the 22:06 UTC spec-validation pivot same-day.
